name: Chicken Mushroom Stove Top Stuffing Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chicken with the mushrooms and half of the soup.
2. Place this mixture in a buttered casserole dish.
3. Top with the stove top dressing (follow directions on box).
4. Bake in a 350°F oven for 45 minutes or until done.
5. Top with the remaining soup.
6. Put back in oven for 5 more minutes.
